# Templates

This folder contains starter artifacts that satisfy the project schemas.

Templates are not examples and they are not real client data.
They provide empty or default-filled structures that can be used to start a new project quickly.

Use this folder for:

- template client interview artifacts
- template strategy artifacts
- template content and creative packages
- template publishing artifacts
- template review artifacts

The template structure should mirror the schema structure closely.

How To Use:

Read [README](../README.md) first, then use this folder to start new artifacts from safe defaults.

Index:

- [Schemas](../schemas/DESCRIPTION.md)
- [Projects](../projects/DESCRIPTION.md)
- [Examples](../examples/DESCRIPTION.md)
